topic: Scale and distribution: why numeric features need transforming
key_concepts: Machine learning algorithms interpret numbers strictly by their mathematical magnitude.
Without transformation, a feature with a large numerical range (like salary) will mathematically dominate a feature with a small range (like age).
Skewed distributions also violate the assumptions of many linear models, degrading performance.

definitions.definition: Rentang nilai minimum hingga maksimum yang dimiliki sebuah variabel numerik.
Persebaran data numerik yang tidak merata secara simetris, sering kali memanjang ke satu sisi batas ekstremnya.

examples: Distance calculations (like Euclidean distance) will completely overshadow 'Age (20-60)' if 'Salary (10k-100k)' is included without scaling.

relations.builds_toward: ch03_s02 (how changing the scale fixes this problem)
